summary: Iter 3 retest of the previously-failing Stripe checkout_status endpoint. All 31/31 pytest backend tests PASS. The critical bug from iter 2 is fixed: GET /api/sponsorships/checkout/status/{session_id} now wraps the Stripe poll in try/except and returns HTTP 200 with the transaction's last-known payment_status ('initiated') for freshly-created unpaid sessions, instead of 500. 404 behavior for unknown session IDs preserved. Smoke regression (/api/, auth, tiers, campaigns CRUD, pledge flow, idempotency) all still green.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:699-707 — fix is correct and minimal: on Stripe exception, returns 200 with txn.get('payment_status','pending'). Good.
Consider: after N consecutive poll failures, mark the txn as 'expired' so the frontend Success page can stop polling (currently it may poll indefinitely on a dead session). Not blocking.
server.py is now ~764 lines — still recommend splitting the sponsorship router into /app/backend/routes/sponsorship.py in a future iteration.
/api/sponsorships/campaigns/{id}/checkout still has no rate limiting and pledge_only accepts anonymous requests (raised-amount inflation risk). Carried over from iter 2.
seed_data_creation: pytest creates TEST_ campaigns + stripe sessions in-run (no new external seed needed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend sponsorship + regression tests green. Stripe status poll now gracefully degrades to txn.payment_status on Stripe errors. If future iterations touch the sponsorship router, rerun /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (all 31 tests ~20s). test_stripe_status_pending_for_unpaid relies on test_stripe_checkout_returns_url_and_session populating pytest.stripe_session_id — keep their execution order.
rca of the issue: Iter 2 bug: emergentintegrations' StripeCheckout.get_checkout_status raises CheckoutError on 'No such session' (common for freshly-created sessions via proxy), propagating an unhandled 500. Fix applied by main agent (server.py:699-707): try/except around get_checkout_status, on exception return 200 with {payment_status: txn.get('payment_status','pending'), amount, currency, campaign_id, tier}. Verified: fresh session returns payment_status='initiated' (not 'paid'); unknown session still 404.
